title: Challenge Action Contract
description: Input contract for challenge resolution — defines what data flows into the challenge loop when a PC attempts an environmental obstacle or skill challenge.

challenge_type.description: The type of challenge being attempted. Categories: physical (climb/swim/jump/balance/push_pull), stealth (hide/sneak), locks (pick_lock/break_door/disable_trap), knowledge (investigate/arcana/history/religion/nature), perception (perception/insight).

challenge_name.description: Human-readable name for the challenge (e.g., 'Climb Cliff Face', 'Locked Chest').

actor_pc.description: ID of the PC attempting the challenge (e.g., 'pc-1', 'pc-rogue').

skill_used.description: The skill used for the ability check.

difficulty_class.description: The DC to beat for this challenge.

attempt_number.description: Which attempt this is (retries after failure may have disadvantage).

bonus_modifiers.description: List of bonus modifiers applied to the check.
